subject: Project Submission Today
body: This is urgent. Submit your final project report immediately. Deadline today 11:59 PM.

subject: Client Issue - Critical Fix Required
body: Important issue reported by client. Please resolve ASAP. This is a critical task.

subject: Exam Form Last Date
body: Reminder: submit exam form now. Deadline today. This is very important and urgent.

subject: Team Meeting Tomorrow
body: Reminder: meeting scheduled tomorrow at 10 AM. Please be prepared with updates.

subject: Assignment Due This Week
body: Your assignment is due soon. Submission deadline is this week. Plan accordingly.

subject: Workshop Next Week
body: A workshop is scheduled next Monday. This is a reminder to register before it fills.

subject: Design Feedback
body: This is not urgent. Review the design whenever convenient. No rush, just for review.

subject: Optional Webinar
body: FYI: optional webinar available. Low priority, attend later if interested.

subject: Reference Material
body: Sharing documents for review. No rush, check whenever free. This is low priority.
